name: io.tickerbot/mcp
description: The stock market, in SQL. Scan the live market, replay any day, or subscribe a query — and Tickerbot POSTs your client the moment it fires. ~12,000 US tickers and top 100 cryptos, refreshed every minute, with 338+ signal columns. Connects Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: TICKERBOT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Tickerbot API key (tb_live_… or tb_test_…). Get one at https://tickerbot.io/dashboard.
